hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'bot\.js$' && ~/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.2/bin/node --check "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.js$' && ~/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.2/bin/node /Users/casey/dev/repos/ubot/node_modules/.bin/mocha; } 2>/dev/null || true
